title: On the Kunneth formula spectral sequence in equivariant K- theory
journal: Mathematical Proceedings of the Cambridge Philosophical Society
abstract: Let G be a compact, connected Lie group such that π2(G) is torsion free. Throughout this paper a vector bundle (representation) will mean a complex vector bundle (representation) and KG will denote the equivariant K-theory functor associabed with the group, G.
